name: @brika/plugin-spotify
description: Spotify Connect player for BRIKA dashboards
author: BRIKA Team

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.label: Client ID (optional)
preferences.description: Only needed for self-hosted setups. Leave empty to use Brika's built-in Spotify app.

preferences.name: connect
preferences.label: Connect to Spotify
preferences.description: Authorize BRIKA to access your Spotify account

preferences.name: developer
preferences.label: Spotify Developer Portal
preferences.description: Create and manage your Spotify app credentials

bricks.name: Spotify Player
bricks.description: Control Spotify playback and display album art

config.name: device
config.label: Device
config.description: Override the default device for this brick

bricks.name: Play a Song
bricks.description: Search Spotify and play any track with one tap

config.name: device
config.label: Device
config.description: Device to play searched songs on

bricks.name: Now Playing
bricks.description: Compact current-track widget (album art, title, artist)

blocks.name: Play Spotify
blocks.description: Start playback on a Spotify device

sparks.name: Track Changed
sparks.description: Emitted when the playing track changes

sparks.name: Playback Paused
sparks.description: Emitted when playback pauses or stops

sparks.name: Volume Changed
sparks.description: Emitted when the active device volume changes

sparks.name: Device Changed
sparks.description: Emitted when playback moves to a different device
